title: Crispy Caramelized Filipino Parma Ham Fried Rice
description: A buttery and shaggy Filipino dish featuring parma ham, perfect for a weeknight dinner, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients. This recipe is easy to make and serves as a great way to use leftover rice.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add diced parma ham and cook until crispy.
Push the parma ham mixture to one side of the skillet.
Add a little more butter if necessary, then pour in the beaten eggs and scramble them until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the parma ham mixture.
Add cooked rice to the skillet, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice with the parma ham and egg mixture for about 5 minutes, until everything is well combined and the rice is heated through.
Season with soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to taste.
